original_clause_text: The tenant shall pay rent on the first day of each month.
clause_text: The tenant shall pay rent on the first day of each month.

original_clause_text: If payment is more than five days late, the landlord may charge a reasonable late fee as allowed by law.
clause_text: If payment is more than five days late, the landlord may charge a reasonable late fee as allowed by law.

original_clause_text: The landlord must provide written notice before entering the rental property except in an emergency.
clause_text: The landlord must provide written notice before entering the rental property except in an emergency.

original_clause_text: The tenant must keep all security codes and building access information confidential.
clause_text: The tenant must keep all security codes and building access information confidential.

original_clause_text: Either party may terminate this agreement after a material breach and written notice.
clause_text: Either party may terminate this agreement after a material breach and written notice.

original_clause_text: The landlord shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages except where prohibited by law.
clause_text: The landlord shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages except where prohibited by law.

original_clause_text: The tenant must keep the rental property clean and avoid causing damage.
clause_text: The tenant must keep the rental property clean and avoid causing damage.
